---
title: "Miss Martin"
---

## Miss Martin

### Description

friend of [[person:1379]Anne Sturges Bourne]

### Biography

CMY writes as if Miss Martin had attended Sturges Bourne on her deathbed, but she was not a member of Sturges Bourne\'s household at the time of the 1891 census, a few months earlier.

### Letters

- Letter from Decr 14th 1891

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
